privileged_info_summary: The agent must export the final text report and screenshot to exact paths in /home/ga/DICOM/exports/, which are actively monitored by the setup and export shell scripts. The measurement math tolerance is verified to be 0.05 in the verifier logic. Notably, while the task requests measuring CTR from an 'axial CT slice', the downloaded public data (Rubo Medical 0002.DCM) is an X-Ray Angiography (Modality: XA) cine loop with 96 frames. If the download fails, a synthetic pydicom dataset (a gradient with a 2000-value circle) is generated and used instead.
